1.solution: Expand: A(1/B+1/C)+B(1/C+1/A)+C(1/A+1/B)=(A/B+B/A)+(A/C+C/A)+(B/C+C/B). By AM-GM each pair ‚Č•2: total ‚Č•6. Equality at A=B=C. Minimum=6.

2.solution: |A‚ąí3|+|B‚ąí4|=6, A,B whole numbers. Let a=A‚ąí3,b=B‚ąí4 with |a|+|b|=6. Enumerate: (a=4,b=2)‚ÜíA=7,B=6,AB=42; (a=3,b=3)‚ÜíA=6,B=7,AB=42 (max). Second highest: (a=5,b=1)‚ÜíA=8,B=5,AB=40 and (a=2,b=4)‚ÜíA=5,B=8,AB=40. Second highest=40. Answer: A.

3.solution: f(x)=min(5x‚ąí7,17‚ąí3x). Intersection: 5x‚ąí7=17‚ąí3x ‚Üí x=3. For x<3: min=5x‚ąí7 (increasing). For x>3: min=17‚ąí3x (decreasing). Maximum at x=3: f(3)=5(3)‚ąí7=8.

4.solution: Let u=y+7: t=u/(u¬≤‚ąí7u+49). Rearrange: tu¬≤‚ąí(7t+1)u+49t=0. For real u: disc=(7t+1)¬≤‚ąí196t¬≤=‚ąí147t¬≤+14t+1‚Č•0 ‚Üí (21t+1)(1‚ąí7t)‚Č•0 ‚Üí ‚ąí1/21‚Č§t‚Č§1/7. Max=1/7 at y=0; min=‚ąí1/21 at y=‚ąí14. Difference=1/7+1/21=3/21+1/21=4/21. Answer: D.

5.solution: f(x)=|47‚ąíx|‚ąí|x+13|. Case x‚Č§‚ąí13: f=(47‚ąíx)+(x+13)=60. Case ‚ąí13‚Č§x‚Č§47: f=(47‚ąíx)‚ąí(x+13)=34‚ąí2x‚ąą[‚ąí60,60]. Case x‚Č•47: f=‚ąí(47‚ąíx)‚ąí(x+13)=‚ąí60. Maximum=60, minimum=‚ąí60. Difference=60‚ąí(‚ąí60)=120.

8.solution: Maximize x‚Āīy‚ĀĶ with 5x+4y=18. By weighted AM-GM: optimal at 5x/4=4y/5‚Üíx=8/5, y=5/2. Max=(8/5)‚Āī√ó(5/2)‚ĀĶ=8‚Āī/5‚Āī√ó5‚ĀĶ/2‚ĀĶ=8‚Āī√ó5/2‚ĀĶ=(2¬≥)‚Āī√ó5/2‚ĀĶ=2¬Ļ¬≤√ó5/2‚ĀĶ=2‚Ā∑√ó5=128√ó5=640.

9.solution: Let a=x‚ąí9, b=16‚ąíx with a+b=7, a,b‚Č•0. Maximize a¬≥b‚Āī. By AM-GM: optimal at a/3=b/4‚Üía=3,b=4. Max=3¬≥√ó4‚Āī=27√ó256=6912. Answer: A (6912).
